🏢 FIRM PROFILE.company_tagline: Day-one payouts, no funded consistency rule, three drawdown types
🏢 FIRM PROFILE.trading_hours: 6:00 PM ET (Sun) to 5:00 PM ET (Fri). Daily maintenance break: 5:00 PM to 6:00 PM ET. All positions must be flat by 5:00 PM ET daily.
🏢 FIRM PROFILE.payout_speed_hours: Next business day (requests submitted before 5:30 PM CT)
🏢 FIRM PROFILE.overnight_holding: Not allowed. All positions must be flat by 5:00 PM ET (auto-liquidated).
🏢 FIRM PROFILE.news_trading_detail: Auto-liquidated 2 minutes before and 2 minutes after Tier 1 economic data releases. Accidental trades tolerated; repeated abuse results in account loss.
🏢 FIRM PROFILE.ea_bots_detail: Third-party purchased bots and ATS prohibited. Tradovate API not exposed. Custom strategies on NinjaTrader, TradingView, Jigsaw are permitted.
🏢 FIRM PROFILE.copy_trading_allowed: Partial — copying FROM a personal external account INTO one TradeDay account is allowed. Copying between TradeDay accounts is not facilitated. All accounts must use the same platform.

💰 PRICING & OFFERS.pricing_model: Monthly subscription (includes one free evaluation + free resets on renewal). Resets available for $59+ or $99.
💰 PRICING & OFFERS.subscription_note: Unlike one-time fee firms, TradeDay uses a recurring monthly subscription model. You get one free evaluation included. If you breach, you can wait for the next billing cycle for a free reset, or pay $59-$99 for an immediate reset.
💰 PRICING & OFFERS.refund_policy_note: 14-day free trial available (no credit card required). Monthly subscription model.
💰 PRICING & OFFERS.reset_fee_note: $59-99 for immediate reset; free on monthly renewal

📊 CHALLENGE MODELS.description: End-of-Day trailing drawdown calculated from realized profits at 4:00 PM CT close. Freezes at starting balance once unlocked. No daily loss limit.

account_sizes.drawdown_freeze: Locks at starting balance once TMD reaches account open balance
account_sizes.consistency_note: 30% rule during evaluation only. No consistency rule once funded.

Locks at starting balance once TMD reaches account open balance

trading_rules.news_trading_detail: Auto-liquidated 2 minutes before and 2 minutes after Tier 1 economic data releases.
trading_rules.ea_restrictions: Third-party purchased bots and ATS prohibited. Tradovate API not exposed. Custom strategies on NinjaTrader, TradingView, Jigsaw are permitted.
trading_rules.copy_trading_restrictions: Copying FROM a personal external account INTO one TradeDay account is allowed. Copying between TradeDay accounts is not facilitated. All accounts must use the same platform.

profit_split_detail.tier_1: 80% trader / 20% firm — first $50,000 in lifetime withdrawals
profit_split_detail.buffer_zone_split: 50% trader / 50% firm — applies to profits withdrawn below the cleared buffer

payout_structure.max_loss_lock: Trailing drawdown locks at starting balance once TMD reaches account open balance
payout_structure.buffer_zone_explained: Buffer = Starting Balance + Max Drawdown. Trader must clear TMD to starting balance before first withdrawal. Withdrawing below buffer triggers 50/50 split on that portion.

restrictions.consistency_note: 30% rule during evaluation only. No consistency rule once funded.

live_transition.requirements: After 3rd withdrawal on Funded Sim, TradeDay may review and move account to Funded Live. Not guaranteed — they contact trader directly.

📊 CHALLENGE MODELS.description: Real-time intraday trailing drawdown calculated from unrealized equity peaks. Tighter but locks at starting balance. Cheapest entry point. No daily loss limit.

🎯 COMPARISON SCORECARD._note: Flat 38-metric scorecard. Every field required. Use null if genuinely unknown. Powers side-by-side firm comparisons.

pricing.cheapest_account_model: Intraday Trailing Drawdown 50K (30% off with code PFA)

key_differentiators: 3 drawdown type choices: EOD, Intraday, and Static
Day-one payouts after clearing buffer zone
No consistency rule once funded (eval only)
Tiered profit split up to 95% (after $100K lifetime withdrawals)
14-day free trial with no credit card required
Path to live capital after 3rd funded sim withdrawal
Static drawdown never moves — most forgiving for whipsaw markets
potential_concerns: Monthly subscription model — longer evaluations cost more over time
No overnight holding on any model (not suitable for swing trading)
News trading auto-liquidated — cannot trade major economic releases
Third-party EA/bots prohibited (custom platform strategies allowed)
30% consistency rule applies during evaluation phase
All accounts must use the same trading platform
Buffer zone withdrawals trigger 50/50 split on that portion
Restricted countries list only partially confirmed — full list requires verification

red_flags.detail: Unlike one-time fee firms, TradeDay charges a recurring monthly fee. Traders who take longer to pass pay more over time.
All positions auto-liquidated at 5:00 PM ET. Not suitable for swing traders.
Auto-liquidation 2 minutes before/after Tier 1 news releases. Cannot trade major events like Fed decisions or NFP.
Third-party ATS and purchased bots not allowed. Tradovate API not exposed. Custom platform strategies (NinjaTrader, TradingView, Jigsaw) are permitted.
If best day exceeds 30% of total profits, the profit target adjusts upward. Can significantly extend evaluation time. Rule removed once funded.
Minimum account is $50K. Traders wanting a lower starting point must look elsewhere.
Withdrawals that dip into the buffer zone are split 50/50 instead of the normal tiered split. Requires careful withdrawal planning.
All accounts must use the same trading platform. Cannot mix Tradovate and NinjaTrader across accounts.

🔴 RED FLAGS & CONSIDERATIONS.restricted_countries_note: Partial list confirmed — full verification required at official help center URL: https://tradeday.freshdesk.com/support/solutions/articles/101000453478-restricted-countries

💡 PRO TIPS FOR TRADERS: Day-one payouts are real — you can request a withdrawal from Day 1 after clearing the buffer zone
